title: Snowy Ruins
description: A small pack adding medieval styled ruins in most snowy biomes.
body:
_(only download this project from **modrinth**, dont download from any place else)_


# Snowy Ruins
This is a small data pack adding ambient snowy ruins in most snowy biomes, these structure can be small buildings or major ruined cities.

### Videos 🎥
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/xNwxcV9UQG4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


### Why Come Here?
Not only can these ruins contain loot like emeralds, enchanted books and golden apples, but the ruins are a great foundation for a base that you could make after restoring them.

### vanilla Friendly

All vanilla blocks
